chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1649 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.5241/2025 (C/A) 09.12.2025 Mr. Muhammad Hamzo Buriro, Advocate along with Petitioners Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate for Sukkur Municipal Corporation >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioners files a statement along with certain documents. Learned Addl. AG files statement of accounts in respect of Petitioner No.2, namely Mujeeb-ur-Rehman and learned counsel for Sukkur Municipal Corporation files a statement / report in respect of Petitioner No.1 Atiq-ur- Rehman, all are taken on record, copies whereof are provided to learned counsel for the Petitioners. Learned Additional AG submits that Petitioner No.2, namely Mujeeb-ur- Rehman is already in government job since last 15 years and is working there and drawing his salaries. In such circumstances, the Respondents are directed to regularize the services of Petitioner No.2, namely Mujeeb-ur-Rehman in accordance with the law. On query made in respect of Petitioner No.1, namely Atiq-ur-Rehman, Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, learned counsel appearing on behalf of Sukkur Municipal Commissioner, Sukkur submits that Petitioner No.1 Atiq-ur-Rehman was appointed on Contract basis for a period of Ninety days on 05.06.2018 and thereafter on completion of his contract period, his contract period was not extended. Conversely, Mr. Muhammad Hamzo Buriro, learned counsel for the Petitioners submits that subsequently vide letter dated 21.10.2020 a request was made by Sukkur Municipal Corporation, Sukkur for obtaining permission for appointing Petitioner No.2 Atiq-ur-Rehman on disabled quota, in spite of that he has not been appointed.

Conversely, Mr. Muhammad Hamzo Buriro, learned counsel for the Petitioners submits that subsequently vide letter dated 21.10.2020 a request was made by Sukkur Municipal Corporation, Sukkur for obtaining permission for appointing Petitioner No.2 Atiq-ur-Rehman on disabled quota, in spite of that he has not been appointed. Under these circumstances, the listed Contempt Application is disposed of. However, the respondents / Municipal Commissioner, Sukkur Municipal Corporation is directed to appoint Petitioner No.2, Atiq-ur-Rehman on disabled quota after fulfillment of requirements as per rules and regulations. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
